title: Garlicky Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful stir fry dish using garlicky flavors. Pair it with a side of rice for a filling meal.
instructions: Heat a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add 1 tablespoon of oil and swirl it around. Then add minced garlicky.
Add your favorite stir-fry vegetables (friendly) and cook for 3-4 minutes.
Add the chopped minari and cook for another 2 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce (dash) and chili flakes (chinese).
Pour the sauce into the wok and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes until the sauce has thickened.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
Garnish with green onions and a sprinkle of sesame seeds (optional).
Enjoy your delicious garlicky stir fry!
